chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 135 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.11 2. For orders on CMA No.922/2025 3. For hearing of main case 12.03.2026 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference which is dismissed as not pressed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
